title: Autopopulate Fields/Columns Showing Up Blank in Emails Using Emails & Activities
excerpt: Hi All - we Use the Emails & Activities Gmail integration, along with templates that use Autopopulate fields from Columns in our boards to send work requests to our offshore resources and have been using this successfull…

posts.author: ecodell (Erin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All - we Use the Emails & Activities Gmail integration, along with templates that use Autopopulate fields from Columns in our boards to send work requests to our offshore resources and have been using this successfully for over 18 months. Recently (within the last week) when we actually hit send on these emails data that is populated from mirrored columns on the board (that are available to be pulled in/autopopulated) are showing up blank, where they never have before. Is this happening to anyone else? Can Monday.com engineers confirm if this is some sort of glitch or change in capabilities in the platform?

Please note - we are not trying to use mirrored columns in an automated email - which we know is not supported - even though we would like to do that as many have noted - but in manually sent emails.

Any help would be much appreciated as this is functionality we’ve always had and is essential for our efficiency as we can’t house every piece of information on one board and connected boards with mirrored columns are key. Thanks!
~Erin

Below is a screenshot of some of the columns in the template that show up blank when sending the email.

image1966×902 173 KB

posts.author: ecodell (Erin)
posts.cookedHtml: Also - we would like to note that the mirrored columns we’re trying to autopop are not formula columns and they are not mirrored more than one level (which we know is not not available functionality).
